blog_title: DTF vs Screen Print vs Sublimation in Summer — Which Print Method Survives Heat in India?
caption:
One customer lost ₹40k on 500 summer tees. DTF cracked in 40°C heat. Screen print faded after 3 washes. Sublimation? Only works on polyester, not cotton.

Here's what survived: Screen print with proper curing (not 10 seconds short). For cotton in Indian summer, it's the only method that lasts.

Save this post before your next bulk order 👇
